mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id, coupon_name, total_count, remain_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM coupon_stock WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}

SELECT coupon_id, coupon_name, total_count, remain_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM coupon_stock ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' AND remain_count > 0 THEN 0 WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, remain_count DESC, coupon_id
SELECT coupon_issue_id, coupon_id, user_id, issued_at FROM coupon_issue WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY issued_at DESC, coupon_issue_id DESC
SELECT coupon_issue_id, coupon_id, user_id, issued_at FROM coupon_issue WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_stock SET remain_count = remain_count - 1, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND remain_count > 0
UPDATE coupon_stock SET remain_count = CASE WHEN remain_count < total_count THEN remain_count + 1 ELSE total_count END, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_coupon_issue.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO coupon_issue ( coupon_issue_id, coupon_id, user_id, issued_at ) VALUES ( #{couponIssueId}, #{couponId}, #{userId}, #{issuedAt} )
